education.degree: Master of Science in Cybersecurity (Artificial Intelligence Emphasis)
Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology

achievements: Identified, validated, and documented 50+ high-severity vulnerabilities prior to production release.
Collaborated with DevSecOps, engineering, and firmware teams to triage findings and reduce resolution cycles by approximately 15%.
Conducted security-focused testing aligned with secure SDLC practices.
Performed root-cause analysis on recurring security defects to improve test coverage and preventive controls.

projects.name: PhishGuard AI
details: Built using Python-based NLP to detect phishing URLs and malicious content in real time.
Evaluated 5,000+ benign and malicious URLs to identify phishing patterns.

projects.name: PQC-Sim
details: Built a Python-based simulator to benchmark post-quantum algorithms against RSA.
Analyzed latency, performance, and computational overhead.
